events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** (high risk). Missing/blocked weep holes above the flashing at the bottom course cut off the drainage path for a masonry veneer/cavity wall, which per TMS 402 and BIA tech notes requires weeps at max ~24 in. o.c. (33 in. max). Since the work is only rough-complete, it's correctable now — the recommended action is to stop close-in, clear cavity debris, install proper weeps, verify flashing continuity, and re-inspect before covering.
